name: Tool Guard
description: Blocks dangerous tool calls before execution.

enabledTools.description: Optional allowlist of tool names this guard should inspect. When empty, all tools are inspected.

blockedCommandSubstrings.description: Case-insensitive command fragments that should block exec-like tools.

blockedPathPrefixes.description: Paths that cannot be targeted by write/edit style tools.

blockedCommandPatterns.description: Regex patterns that should hard-block shell-like tool calls.

blockedCommandRulesFile.description: Path to a JSON file with a top-level commands array for hard-block shell rules.

confirmCommandPatterns.description: Regex patterns that should require user confirmation before shell-like tool calls.

confirmCommandRulesFile.description: Path to a JSON file with a top-level commands array for confirmation-required shell rules.

sensitiveContentPatterns.description: Regex patterns that should block or redact sensitive content.

sensitiveContentRulesFile.description: Path to a JSON file containing sensitive-content regex rules.

protectedPathTools.description: Tool names whose path-like params should be checked against blockedPathPrefixes.

execTools.description: Tool names treated as shell/command execution tools.

pathParamNames.description: Parameter names to treat as file paths during path validation.

logAllowedCalls.description: Whether to log inspected tool calls that were allowed.

blockMessageWrites.description: Whether to block assistant/tool messages that contain sensitive content before they are written to the session.

blockMessageSending.description: Whether to block outbound channel messages that contain sensitive content.

redactToolResults.description: Whether to redact sensitive tool results before persistence.

confirmTtlMs.description: How long a confirmation token stays valid, in milliseconds.

allowSelfModification.description: Whether write/edit/apply_patch operations targeting the tool-guard plugin directory should bypass confirmation.
